article_title: Burnham has big ideas - but what will they cost?

tasks.prompt: What central tension does the article explore?
options: How ambitious political promises must fit financial constraints
Whether the UK should abolish all local government
Why financial markets no longer watch government policy
How to replace the Treasury with private banks
tasks.correct_answer: How ambitious political promises must fit financial constraints
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה מנתחת את המתח בין רעיונות גדולים לבין העלות, מגבלות התקציב ותגובת השווקים.

tasks.prompt: Which area of spending is presented as a possible use for additional borrowing?
options: Infrastructure investment
Private luxury travel
Foreign football clubs
Advertising for political parties
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה דנה באפשרות להפנות גיוס חוב נוסף להשקעות בתשתיות.

tasks.prompt: Why are financial markets watching the government's decisions closely?
options: They want to choose the cabinet personally
Borrowing, tax and spending choices can affect confidence and financing costs
They are responsible for writing every law
They expect all public services to become free immediately
tasks.correct_answer: Borrowing, tax and spending choices can affect confidence and financing costs
tasks.explanation_hebrew: השווקים בוחנים האם המדיניות הפיסקלית אמינה, משום שהיא משפיעה על אמון ועלויות מימון.

tasks.prompt: In this article, what does a financial “buffer” mean?
options: A ban on all government borrowing
A protected margin against uncertainty or unexpected costs
A payment made directly to every voter
A rule that fixes all prices
tasks.correct_answer: A protected margin against uncertainty or unexpected costs
tasks.explanation_hebrew: buffer הוא מרווח ביטחון שנועד להתמודד עם אי־ודאות או זעזועים בלתי צפויים.

tasks.prompt: Why might changing fiscal rules create both opportunities and risks? Answer in 3–6 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: It could allow more investment or infrastructure spending
More borrowing may increase debt or financing costs
The government must balance growth goals with stability

tasks.prompt: What policy areas mentioned in the article show Burnham's interest in shifting power or rebuilding regions? Answer in 3–5 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Devolution or transferring powers away from central government
Institutions or structures designed to support local development

tasks.prompt: What does the phrase “every tricky decision and trade-off is being watched” imply about the new government?
options: Its choices have political and economic consequences at the same time
It can make decisions without public scrutiny
Only local councils care about its policies
The costs of policies are already known with certainty
tasks.correct_answer: Its choices have political and economic consequences at the same time
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הביטוי מדגיש שכל החלטה נבחנת גם מבחינה פוליטית וגם מבחינת אמון השווקים והעלות הכלכלית.

tasks.prompt: Write a 120–170 word summary of the article without copying sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Burnham enters office with ambitious policy ideas
He faces borrowing, tax and spending constraints
Infrastructure, regeneration and devolution are part of the discussion
Markets are watching fiscal credibility and possible policy changes
The article stresses trade-offs between ambition, growth and stability

tasks.prompt: Evaluate in 3–6 sentences why infrastructure borrowing may be politically attractive but economically difficult.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: It can support growth, services or regional regeneration
Benefits may take years to appear
Borrowing raises debt and may concern markets
Projects must be chosen and managed carefully

tasks.prompt: Write a three-sentence analytical conclusion explaining what will determine whether Burnham's programme succeeds.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Credible funding, tax and borrowing decisions
Ability to maintain public and market confidence while delivering results
